prerequisites: An Intercom account with access to a workspace whose data you want to sync.
An app created in the Intercom Developer Hub (https://app.intercom.io/a/apps/_/developer-hub/app-packages) to obtain an access token or OAuth credentials.
A start_date marking the earliest point in time from which to replicate data (required).

authMethods.name: Access token (private app)
authMethods.summary: Map to the access_token secret field. Create an app in the Intercom Developer Hub, open Configure > Authentication, and copy the workspace Access Token (also shown on Test & Publish > Your Workspaces). Intercom sends it as an HTTP Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>). Used for accessing your own workspace data.

authMethods.name: OAuth (public app)
authMethods.summary: Map to the client_id and client_secret secret fields. In the Developer Hub, enable 'Use OAuth' on the Authentication page, configure HTTPS redirect URLs and scopes, then find the client_id and client_secret on the app's Basic Information page. The OAuth code-exchange flow yields an access token used to authorize calls on behalf of other workspaces.

setupSteps.title: Create an Intercom app in the Developer Hub
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Intercom and create an app at https://app.intercom.io/a/apps/_/developer-hub/app-packages. This app is where you obtain the access token or OAuth credentials used to authenticate the connector.

setupSteps.title: Obtain your access token
setupSteps.body: For a private app, open Configure > Authentication in your app and copy the Access Token (it also appears on Test & Publish > Your Workspaces). Provide this value as the connector's required access_token field. Treat the token like a password and keep it confidential.

setupSteps.title: (Alternative) Set up OAuth credentials
setupSteps.body: If using OAuth, tick 'Use OAuth' on the Developer Hub Authentication page, set HTTPS redirect URLs, and choose the required permission scopes. Copy the client_id and client_secret from the app's Basic Information page and supply them as the connector's client_id and client_secret fields.

setupSteps.title: Set the replication start date
setupSteps.body: Provide the required start_date to define the earliest point from which the connector replicates Intercom data.

setupSteps.title: Tune optional settings as needed
setupSteps.body: Optionally adjust the connector's non-secret fields: api_rate_limit, num_workers, lookback_window, and activity_logs_time_step to control throughput and incremental sync behavior.
